    08Apakah ada layanan kursi roda untuk tamu lansia/disabilitas?Is there wheelchair service for seniors/disabilities?<p>Layanan kursi roda untuk tamu lansia atau disabilitas tersedia di BXSea UTF-8<p>Wheelchair service for elderly or disabled guests is available at BXSea UTF-8facility
    19Bisakah saya membawa stroller anak atau kursi roda tamu lansia/disabilitas UTF-8Can I bring a child stroller or wheelchair of an elderly/disabled guest onboard?<p>Ya, namun perlu diperhatikan kami menyesuaikan jumlah stroller atau kursUTF-8<p>Yes, but please note that we adjust the number of strollers or wheelchaiUTF-8facility
    213Apakah boleh membawa makanan dan minuman dari luar?Is it permissible to bring outside food and drinks?<p>Kami memliki beberapa tenant makanan dan minuman di dalam BXSea, sepertiUTF-8<p>We have several food and beverage tenants within BXSea, such as WingstopUTF-8facility
    314Apakah ada musholla di dalam BXSea?Is there a prayer room (musholla) inside BXSea?<p>Pengunjung dapat menunaikan ibadah di musholla BXSea yang terdapat di laUTF-8<p>Visitors can perform their prayers at the BXSea prayer room(musholla) siUTF-8facility
    415Apakah saya boleh membawa koper kedalam BXSea?Am I allowed to bring luggage into BXSea?<p>Kami tidak memperkenankan pengunjung untuk membawa koper dalam jenis apaUTF-8<p>We do not allow visitors to bring any type of luggage (including airwheeUTF-8facility
